phase_2.correlations: Strong negative correlation across all modalities: noisy busy audio environment aligns with continuous walking motion context, elevated heart rate matches physical activity levels, and extensive GPS travel confirms the user was mobile throughout. phase_2.holistic_assessment: This session shows zero concentration indicators. The user was continuously walking through busy, noisy environments for nearly 2 hours with no stationary periods. phase_3.recommendations: 1) Establish a dedicated stationary study location to eliminate travel and movement distractions. 2) Choose quiet environments with <45 dB ambient noise and minimal speech to support concentration. 3) Schedule study sessions separately from commute/errand time blocks to ensure physiological readiness (lower heart rate) and environmental stability.
